summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five unrelated open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard has no shared canonical, merge/fix are blocked by job frontmatter, low-signal closeout is disabled, and each PR retains distinct contributor work requiring normal maintainer review or more proof.

actions.reason: Distinct open feature PR with contributor work and no hydrated duplicate/canonical target; keep it out of closeout and leave normal maintainer review/check repair to a separate path.
This appears review-ready, but the job requires human judgment for maintainer_signal, green_checks, and technical correctness; no merge action is allowed in this plan.
Focused bug fix with green checks and session-state semantics requires maintainer technical correctness judgment; merge and fixed-by-candidate closeout are not allowed in this job.
Distinct provider compatibility PR with failed proof and waiting-on-author signal; not a duplicate, not low-signal closeable under this job, and not eligible for merge/fix planning.
Distinct memory-core bugfix PR that still needs behavior proof; keep independent and do not close or merge from this inventory shard.

needs_human: #92863: Maintainer review is required for the ready-for-maintainer docs PR because merge is blocked in this job and technical correctness/green-check decisions are explicitly human-gated.
